---
title: "Anne Isabella Ritchie"
---

## Anne Isabella Ritchie

**Dates:** (1837-1919)

**Maiden name:** (Thackeray), Lady

### Biography

She lived with her brother-in-law Leslie Stephen until 1875 when she married Richmond Ritchie and had Hester (b. 1878) and William (b. 1880). [ODNB]

### Letters

- Letter from November 19, 1897.
- Letter from May 8th [1894?]
- Letter from March 27th 1894
- Letter from February 7th 1894
- Letter from May 13 1874
- Letter from July 25. 1867.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
